item.title: Praxis Precision Shares Rally On Price Target Hikes: Analyst Sees Upside As High As 100% For Stock
item.description: Praxis said on Thursday that it made two submissions earlier this year to the FDA, seeking clearance to market ulixacaltamide for the treatment of ess...

item.title: Applovin Stock In Focus Amid Reportedly Ongoing SEC Probe; Convequity Says Wait For The Dip Before Investing
item.description: The SEC stated to Bloomberg News that an “investigation involving AppLovin is still active and ongoing”.

item.title: Harvard Professor Blames Longest Govt. Shutdown For Lower-Than-Expected Q4 GDP Growth
item.description: Jason Furman, Professor of Economics at the Harvard Kennedy School, said on Friday that the U.S. government’s 43-day shutdown subtracted 1.15 percenta...

item.title: Trump Slaps 10% Global Tariff After Supreme Court Ruling That He Called ‘Deeply Disappointing’
item.description: In a press briefing, Trump said that he is “ashamed of certain members of the court” for not having the courage to do what’s right for the United Stat...

item.title: Trump Reportedly Plans New Tariffs On Countries In Response To Court’s Order
item.description: Donald Trump in response to the Supreme Court’s order on Friday announced in his presser a 10% global tariff under Section 122.
